tests.test_list: cargo test -p a2d retry_run_next_cycle -- --list listed 10 tests
tests.focused_retry_next_cycle_unit: cargo test -p a2d retry_run_next_cycle -- --nocapture passed (10 tests)
tests.focused_retry_execute_integration: cargo test -p a2d --test senior_swe_bench_retry_execute -- --nocapture passed (8 tests)

source_diff_hash_command: git diff --binary HEAD -- crates | git hash-object --stdin
fitness_claim_scope: local sudoku actual-test source evidence only; not official Senior SWE-Bench mastery
